title: The Oracle Never Blinks
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A disgraced CIA analyst who can predict macro-economic collapses by reading social-media sentiment patterns is kidnapped by a rogue Treasury faction that wants her to trigger a depression, while a parallel-timeline version of her sends warnings through the only video file she can alter on her own phone.
long_description: A disgraced CIA analyst who can predict macro-economic collapses by reading social-media sentiment patterns is kidnapped by a rogue Treasury faction that wants her to trigger a depression, while a parallel-timeline version of her sends warnings through the only video file she can alter on her own phone.
